summary: Hydrated preflight shows #78431 is the only actionable open candidate and remains the best canonical issue for the Discord statusReactions timing bug. The linked PR #81623 is already closed and excluded as existing-overlap context, so it is evidence only. No close, merge, fix, label, or security action is appropriate.

actions.reason: Keep #78431 open as the canonical tracking issue. The only linked implementation PR is already closed and unsuitable for candidate-fix closeout; fix and raise_pr actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
